steps.title: Substitute x = 0 into the function
steps.content:
Replace x with 0 in $$g(x) = -x + 8$$ to get $$g(0) = -(0) + 8$$.
Since $$-0 = 0$$, this simplifies to $$g(0) = 8$$.

steps.title: Match result to answer choices
steps.content:
The computed value is 8.
Looking at the choices:
  • A) $-8$
  • B) 0
  • C) 4
  • D) 8
The value 8 corresponds to choice D.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
